name: execute_kip_readonly
description: Executes one or more read-only KIP (Knowledge Interaction Protocol) commands (e.g. FIND, SEARCH, DESCRIBE) against the Cognitive Nexus to query from your persistent memory.

command.description: A single complete read-only KIP command (FIND / SEARCH / DESCRIBE). Mutually exclusive with commands.

commands.description: An array of read-only KIP commands (FIND / SEARCH / DESCRIBE) for batch execution (reduces round-trips). Commands are executed sequentially; per-command errors are returned inline without aborting the batch. KML commands (UPSERT / DELETE) are rejected by this endpoint.

command.description: A complete read-only KIP command with parameters scoped to this command.

parameters.description: Optional parameters for this command. These override shared parameters with the same keys.

An optional JSON object of key-value pairs used for safe substitution of placeholders in the command string(s). Placeholders should start with ':' (e.g., :name, :limit). IMPORTANT: A placeholder must occupy a complete KIP value position (e.g., name: :name, LIMIT :limit, or SEARCH CONCEPT :term). Do not embed placeholders inside quoted strings (e.g., "Hello :name"), because substitution uses JSON serialization.

dry_run.description: If set to true, the command(s) will only be validated for syntactical and logical correctness without being executed.
